business.name: Done Wright Seamless Gutters LLC
business.tagline: One call, one crew, gutters done right

hero.headline: Gutters *done Wright* the first time
hero.subheadline: Tyler shows up when he says he will — and finishes in one day.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Seamless gutters that actually work
services_section.subheading: No leaks, no mess, no coming back to fix it

services.title: Seamless Gutter Installation
services.description: Custom-fitted gutters cut on-site. No joints to leak, no patches to fail.

services.title: Gutter Repair & Maintenance
services.description: Fix what's broken, clean what's clogged. Get your gutters working again.

services.title: Downspout Installation
services.description: Proper drainage means water goes where it should — away from your foundation.

services.title: Custom Color Matching
services.description: Gutters that blend with your home's style, not fight against it.

about.heading: Tyler Wright — Owner, Installer
about.body: One truck, one crew, fair prices. We're the Wilmington gutter team that shows up and gets it done right the first time.

reviews_section.label: WORD OF MOUTH
reviews_section.heading: What Wilmington says about our work

reviews.name: Natasha J.
reviews.text: Tyler was professional and timely — did excellent work at a fair price. I was dreading getting gutters because of our home's decorative features, but they looked great.

reviews.name: David L.
reviews.text: Tyler owns the company and did an excellent job. His price was really good — much better than the big companies. Came when he said and finished in one day.

reviews.name: Donald S.
reviews.text: Tyler's quality of work is exceptional — a true experienced pro. On time, dependable, fair prices. He'll be my go-to gutter expert going forward.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Wilmington and the Cape Fear region
service_areas.subheading: One day installation throughout the area

cta.heading: Ready for gutters that actually work?
cta.body: Call Tyler directly for a free estimate. No pushy sales calls, just straight talk about what your home needs.
